name: wufoo
description: Reads Wufoo forms, fields, entries, comments, reports, and widgets, and writes entry submissions and webhook registrations through the Wufoo API.

risk.read: external Wufoo API read of form, field, entry, comment, report, and widget data
risk.write: external mutation: submits live form entries and registers/removes webhook callback URLs
risk.approval: required for all write actions (submit_entry, add_webhook, delete_webhook); reads require none
